en: OF DAVID. Bless the LORD, O my soul, and all that is within me, bless his holy name!
zh: 我的心哪！你要稱頌耶和華； 在我裡面的一切，都要稱頌他的聖名。

en: Bless the LORD, O my soul, and forget not all his benefits,
zh: 我的心哪！你要稱頌耶和華； 不可忘記他的一切恩惠。

en: who forgives all your iniquity, who heals all your diseases,
zh: 他赦免你的一切罪孽， 醫治你的一切疾病；

en: who redeems your life from the pit, who crowns you with steadfast love and mercy,
zh: 他救贖你的性命脫離死亡， 以慈愛和憐憫作你的冠冕；

en: who satisfies you with good so that your youth is renewed like the eagle's.
zh: 他以福樂使你的心願滿足， 以致你好像鷹一般恢復青春的活力。

en: The LORD works righteousness and justice for all who are oppressed.
zh: 耶和華施行公義， 為所有受欺壓的人主持公道。

en: He made known his ways to Moses, his acts to the people of Israel.
zh: 他向摩西指示自己的道路， 向以色列人顯明自己的作為。

en: The LORD is merciful and gracious, slow to anger and abounding in steadfast love.
zh: 耶和華有憐憫，有恩典， 不輕易發怒，並且有豐盛的慈愛。

en: He will not always chide, nor will he keep his anger forever.
zh: 他不長久責備， 也不永遠懷怒。

en: He does not deal with us according to our sins, nor repay us according to our iniquities.
zh: 他沒有按著我們的罪過待我們， 也沒有照著我們的罪孽報應我們。

en: For as high as the heavens are above the earth, so great is his steadfast love toward those who fear him;
zh: 天離地有多高， 他的慈愛向敬畏他的人也有多大。

en: as far as the east is from the west, so far does he remove our transgressions from us.
zh: 東離西有多遠， 他使我們的過犯離我們也有多遠。

en: As a father shows compassion to his children, so the LORD shows compassion to those who fear him.
zh: 父親怎樣憐恤兒子， 耶和華也照樣憐恤敬畏他的人；

en: For he knows our frame; he remembers that we are dust.
zh: 因為他知道我們的本體， 記得我們不過是塵土。

en: As for man, his days are like grass; he flourishes like a flower of the field;
zh: 至於世人，他的年日好像草一般； 他又像野地繁茂的花。

en: for the wind passes over it, and it is gone, and its place knows it no more.
zh: 經風一吹，就歸無有； 他原來的地方再不認識他。

en: But the steadfast love of the LORD is from everlasting to everlasting on those who fear him, and his righteousness to children's children,
zh: 但從亙古到永遠，耶和華的慈愛臨到敬畏他的人； 他的公義也歸於他們的子子孫孫，

en: to those who keep his covenant and remember to do his commandments.
zh: 就是那些謹守他的約， 記住他的訓詞，並且遵行的人。

en: The LORD has established his throne in the heavens, and his kingdom rules over all.
zh: 耶和華在天上立定寶座， 他的王權統管萬有。

en: Bless the LORD, O you his angels, you mighty ones who do his word, obeying the voice of his word!
zh: 你們作他天使的， 就是那些大有能力，行他所吩咐， 以及聽從他命令的，都要稱頌耶和華。

en: Bless the LORD, all his hosts, his ministers, who do his will!
zh: 你們作他的眾軍， 作他的僕役，遵行他旨意的， 都要稱頌耶和華。

en: Bless the LORD, all his works, in all places of his dominion. Bless the LORD, O my soul!
zh: 你們一切被他所造的， 在他統治的各處，都要稱頌耶和華。 我的心哪，你要稱頌耶和華。
